Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 20202 0 0}{f 5 21 1 101}Welcome. Oh, it's you! Thanks for always coming by![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 101}It's almost the season for cherry blossoms. Do you know the meaning of cherry blossom flowers?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 101}Spring is supposed to represent new beginnings, so I wonder why its flower meaning is so sad.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 20202 0 0}{f 5 21 1 101}Welcome! What kind of flowers are you looking for?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 101}Spring is a time when all kinds of flowers bloom, so it's fun to have a variety to choose from.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 101}The cherry blossoms may bloom soon... Do you know the flower meaning of cherry blossoms?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 101}Spring is supposed to represent new beginnings, so I wonder why its flower meaning is so sad.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 20204 0 0}{f 5 21 1 101}We'll have new flowers coming in next week. Do come around again to see them.[n]{f 1 1}
